regions.text: Measuring rapid changes in renal function accurately in criticaly ill patients is difficult and there is no gold standard method. A useful, routine exogenous nsarker has remained elusive and there are well-deseribed difficulties when inter- preting creatinine clearance. Tubular secretion and extrarenal elinination of creatinineincreases as GFRdeteriorates, thus exaggerating the discrepancy between the clearance of creatinine and true renal function [47]. In addition, serum creatinine concentrations are intluencedbynuscle mass, protein intake,gender, and age, Limiting the precision further. The influence of these factors in the acute setting is not clear. However, over a period of hours and days, as the renal function deteriorates in AKI, one would anticipate that these other factors would remain relatively constant. However, results in patients with diabetes, paediatric patients, and those with early renal impairment did not show a significant difference between cystatin C and creatinine based eGFR, indicating that the performance may be patient population specifie [40 43]. Human studies also suggest that cystatin C can predict the development of AKI [44] and the requirement for renal replacement therapy [45],although its superiority over serum creatinine has not been a universal finding [46]. Measuring rapid changes in renal function accurately in criticaly ill patients is difficult and there is no gold standard method. A useful, routine exogenous nsarker has remained elusive and there are well-deseribed difficulties when inter- preting creatinine clearance. Tubular secretion and extrarenal elinination of creatinineincreases as GFRdeteriorates, thus exaggerating the discrepancy between the clearance of creatinine and true renal function [47]. In addition, serum creatinine concentrations are intluencedbynuscle mass, protein intake,gender, and age, Limiting the precision further. The influence of these factors in the acute setting is not clear. However, over a period of hours and days, as the renal function deteriorates in AKI, one would anticipate that these other factors would remain relatively constant. Aware of its linitations. in the absence of an aecepted

Using methods based on cystatin C when compared a higher correlation and improved accuracy in predicting with snethods incorporating serum creatinine have shown GFR in patients with various degrees of renal function, liver. disease, and spinal cord injuries [17]. However, results in patients with diabetes, paediatric patients, and those with early renal impairment did not show a significant difference between cystatin C and creatinine based eGFR, indicating that the performance may be patient population specifie [40 43]. Human studies also suggest that cystatin C can predict the development of AKI [44] and the requirement for renal replacement therapy [45],although its superiority over serum creatinine has not been a universal finding [46]. Data presented in this study demonstrate a very broed

A sinall study of eighteen critically ill patients used correlation coefficients to compare clearance of DTPA or inulin (their gold-standard measure)to 2-hour creatinine clearance CrCl[48]. The authors conclude that a CrCl is not an accurate description of inulin clearance,in this population,when the GFR is <30 mL-minHowever, reanalysis of the published raw data reveals a correlation coefficient (r) between DTPA and 2- is not discussed in the original paper. Perhaps the more hour creatinine clearance f 0.92 P<0.d01though this encouraging conclusion should include the close relationship with DTPA clearance. There is no mention of urine volumse during the study tine period and patients with very low DTPA clearances (2mL-min)were included.

'reatnine Data presented in this study demonstrate a very broad range of both CrCl and cystatin C neasurement across each of the AKIN/RIFLE criteria. Figure 3 shows that serum cystatin Cincreased with worsening renal function neasured by CtCl, but the correlation coefficient is not compelling and the confidence intervals are wide. When originally derived, the equations which incorporate cystatin C showed minimal bias and excellent accuracy with P of 81%, 83%, and 89% for cystatin C1,C3, and C4 equations, respectively [16].
